# Product Escalation – Veteran-Facing Issue

Use this template to escalate veteran-facing issues to Product/Engineering. Complete all sections to support efficient triage.

## Required Before Submission
- [ ] I have verified the issue is reproducible or confirmed via multiple reports, if applicable.
- [ ] I have confirmed this is not a duplicate of an existing GitHub issue.
- [ ] I have included a Slack thread, if one exists.
- [ ] I have included supporting evidence such as screenshots, logs, case IDs, or similar artifacts.
- [ ] I have identified the affected environment.
- [ ] I have assessed severity using the defined criteria.

## 1. Short Description
Provide a concise summary of the issue.

## 2. Timeline of Issue
- **First reported:**  
- **Ongoing? (Yes/No):**  
- **Date range of impacted cases, if known:**  

## 3. Expected Behavior
Describe the expected system behavior or user flow.

## 4. Actual Behavior
Describe the observed behavior, error messages, or failure point.

## 5. Impact
- **Number of affected Veterans, if known:**  
- **Frequency (isolated / multiple reports / widespread):**  
- **Business impact, if known:**  

## 6. Affected Environment(s)
- [ ] Production
- [ ] Staging
- [ ] Other:  

## 7. Severity
- [ ] High — Widespread impact or blocking critical functionality
- [ ] Medium — Limited impact or workaround exists
- [ ] Low — Minor issue or cosmetic

## 8. Visibility
- [ ] User visible
- [ ] Stakeholder visible
- [ ] Internal only

## 9. Slack Thread
- **Link:**  

## 10. Supporting Evidence
- **Screenshots:**  
- **Screen recordings:**  
- **Logs:**  
- **ICNs / Case IDs:**  

## 11. Related Links
- **Tracking spreadsheet:**  
- **Related GitHub issues:**  
- **Relevant dashboards (DOMO, etc.):**  

## 12. Additional Context
Include any other information that would help Product/Engineering triage this issue.
